Title: Quotient Remainder
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print quotient and remainder space separated.

Title: Even Check
Problem_Statement: Read n and print 1 if even else 0.

Title: Increment
Problem_Statement: Read n and print n+1.

Title: Expression A Plus B Times C
Problem_Statement: Read a b c and print a+b*c.

Title: Average Three
Problem_Statement: Read three integers and print integer average.

Title: Decrement
Problem_Statement: Read n and print n-1.

Title: Multiply by Two Shift
Problem_Statement: Read n and print n << 1.

Title: Divide by Two Shift
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative n and print n >> 1.

Title: Modulo Ten
Problem_Statement: Read positive integer n and print n % 10.

Title: Square Expression
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print (a+b)*(a+b).

Title: Bitwise AND
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print a & b.

Title: Bitwise OR
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print a | b.

Title: Left Shift
Problem_Statement: Read n k and print n shifted left by k.

Title: Absolute Difference
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print absolute difference.

Title: Precedence Difference
Problem_Statement: Read a b c and print (a+b)*c.

Title: Right Shift
Problem_Statement: Read n k and print n shifted right by k.

Title: Bitwise XOR
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print a ^ b.

Title: Is Multiple of 5
Problem_Statement: Read n and print 1 if multiple of 5 else 0.

Title: Opposite Signs Check
Problem_Statement: Read non-zero a and b. Print 1 if opposite signs else 0.

Title: Sum of Squares
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print a*a + b*b.

Title: GCD and LCM Euclid
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to find the GCD and LCM of given two numbers using Euclid's method.
Read two positive integers. Print GCD followed by space followed by LCM.

Title: Quadratic Discriminant
Problem_Statement: Read a b c and print discriminant b*b-4*a*c.

Title: Mask Lower N Bits
Problem_Statement: Read n and print (1<<n)-1.

Title: Toggle Bit
Problem_Statement: Read n k and print n with kth bit toggled (0-indexed).

Title: Count Set Bits
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative integer n and print count of set bits (1s in binary).

Title: Power of Two Check
Problem_Statement: Read positive integer n and print 1 if power of 2 else 0.
